calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing Re Filing Of The Original 13100 Petition
Off Calendar Jun-01-2026 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #2, Report, Fees
Off Calendar May-07-2026 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Brianna Mannion, for the San Francisco Public Administrator, Petitioner.

Heather Chubb, and Angie Lam, for American Research Bureau and Alliance Estate Research, Assignees.

At the outset, the court queries regarding when the original 13100 Affidavit for Bill Hanaoka will be filed. Counsel requests a one-month continuance to file the preceding. Ms. Mannion states that if the court is inclined to grant the continuance, she asks that the court consider approving distribution to the Estate of Bill Hanaoka, instead of to his successors in interest and set a status on the filing of the 13100 petition. The court agrees and the matter is submitted with the intent to approve distribution to the Estate of Bill Hanaoka. A Status Hearing re filing of the original 13100 petition is set for Jun-01-2026 at 9:00 AM in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Michael McNaughton. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not Reported.

Off Calendar Aug-26-2024 Continued To Sep-30-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Azita Rahim appeared by zoom for American Research Bureau.

The court questioned why the probate examiner's notes from seven months ago have not been addressed. Mrs. Rahim stated that she amended the petition to address the notes, that she is going over it with Heather Chubb attorney for Alliance Estate Research, that she should have the petition shortly and that she is waiting to hear from Mrs. Chubb. The Petition to Determine Heirship, etc. is continued to September 30, 2024, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Nguyen. Not reported.
